params.name: Theremin
params.description:
On Mar 5, 1920 AD, Lev Termin invented the world's first electronic musical instrument.
Theremin was invented by Lev Termin. It is the world's first electronic musical instrument. Unlike the modern version that has transistors and integrated circuits, it was completely driven by a motor and its functions were far from completion. But it was light and economic, setting the regular expensive, complex, and massive organ at a disadvantage. After it was invented, the development of electronic inst …
